faqs.question: What types of ants are common in Far Rockaway?
faqs.answer: Far Rockaway commonly sees pavement ants, odorous house ants, carpenter ants, and moisture ants due to the coastal climate. Carpenter ants are particularly concerning in this area as the humid ocean air can create wood moisture issues that attract these destructive pests to homes and buildings.
